title: Vibrant Herbal Italian Lamb Caponata
description: A hearty and flavorful Italian dish featuring lamb loin chops, beurre-monte, and a variety of herbs, perfect for a hangover cure or a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb loin chops with salt and black pepper.
In a large skillet, heat the beurre-monte over medium-high heat and sear the lamb loin chops until browned on both sides.
Transfer the lamb loin chops to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15 minutes or until cooked to desired doneness.
In the same skillet, add the chopped celery, caperrberries, green olives, and minced garlic, and cook until the celery is tender.
Stir in the red wine vinegar and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the fresh rosemary and thyme to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
To serve, slice the roasted lamb loin chops and top with the herbal caponata mixture.
